subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and unwavering servant of the Ancient Beauty! At all times are we occupied with the remembrance of that Ancient Friend and intimate Companion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده ثابت راسخ جمال قدم در جمیع اوقات بذکر ان یار قدیم و حبیب ندیم مشغولیم
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
